description: Create a STRIDE threat model for the OWASP Juice Shop application using the architecture specification located at '~/Desktop/juice_shop_architecture.md'. Produce a draw.io diagram saved to '~/Desktop/juice_shop_threat_model.drawio' consisting of two pages. The first page, titled 'Level 1 DFD', must be a Data Flow Diagram incorporating the Browser/User, Stripe Payment Gateway, SMTP Email Service, Angular SPA, Express.js API, Authentication Module, SQLite Database, and File System, along with Internet, Application, and Data trust boundaries and labeled data flows. The second page, titled 'STRIDE Analysis', must identify at least 6 potential threats mapped to the STRIDE categories (Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, Elevation of Privilege). Export the 'Level 1 DFD' page as a PNG image to '~/Desktop/juice_shop_threat_model.png'.
